title: Create Zinc craft
description: No more missing zinc! This mod adds a simple recipe: for zinc nuggets using Create’s mechanical press. Perfect for players who love automation!
body:
**Create: Zinc craft** is a lightweight add-on for the Create mod that adds a three simple but useful crafting recipes and resource conversions, making early-game progression smoother and more creative, Great for players who love automation!.

# 🔧 **New Features:**
Zinc Nuggets from Deepslate – Use the Mechanical Press to crush Deepslate into Zinc Nuggets.

![zinc craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92f75245345d828a4c7c1f212b25f282bd19873a.png)

Deepslate Crafting – Combine Cobblestone + Lava  in a press Basin to create Deepslate.

![craft of deepslate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15200094ab1b20bbf474b9db1bea655298f89be1.png)

Netherrack Crafting – Convert Deepslate into Netherrack via Bulk Haunting

![netherac craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3f3eed2fbfdac44ceac5e161e9b27ff087122b5.png)

# 🧩 **Requirements:**
Create mod (latest version recommended)

Works well with JEI/REI for recipe visibility

## 💡 **Why Use This Addon?**
If you just want more ways to automate resource generation, this mini add-on gives you smart, balanced recipes to expand your tech tree using Create mechanics.
